SEARCH
Package discount

Class PackFixedPercentage

java.lang.Object
discount.Discount
discount.PackDiscount
discount.PackFixedPercentage
All Implemented Interfaces:
FixedPercentageDiscount
public class PackFixedPercentage extends PackDiscount implements FixedPercentageDiscount
It implements the Pack discount whose type is Fixed Percentage
Version:
1.0
Author:
Ana O.R.

  • Constructor Details

    • PackFixedPercentage

      public PackFixedPercentage(String id, LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate, double percentage, Pack... packs) throws IllegalArgumentException
      A fixed percentage discount's general constructor with packs
      Parameters:
      id - the discount's id
      startDate - the date when the discount starts
      endDate - the date when the discount ends
      percentage - the percentage deducted from a product's price
      packs - the discount's pack
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - the percentage wasn't between 0 and 100

    • PackFixedPercentage

      public PackFixedPercentage(LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate, double percentage, Pack... packs) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Instantiates a new fixed percentage discount with packs
      Parameters:
      startDate - the date when the discount starts
      endDate - the date when the discount ends
      percentage - the percentage deducted from a product's price
      packs - the discount's packs
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - the percentage wasn't between 0 and 100
